trade.summary: Solid bilateral trade within the EFTA framework. Both are EFTA members, enabling preferential trade. Svizzera exports pharmaceuticals, machinery, and chemicals. Norvegia exports petroleum products, fish, and maritime equipment.

diplomatic.summary: Excellent relations as fellow EFTA members and small, prosperous European democracies. Both value multilateralism and international law. Norvegia's Government Pension Fund Global holds Swiss assets; Svizzera manages Norwegian-related wealth. Both outside EU, both in Schengen.

military.summary: Svizzera is neutral; Norvegia is a NATO founding member. No formal military ties. Informal security dialogue on European security matters. Norvegia's Arctic security concerns are outside Svizzera's traditional diplomatic focus.

financial.summary: Norvegia's sovereign wealth fund (GPFG) invests significantly in Svizzera. Swiss financial institutions manage Norwegian capital. Both are major financial centers in their own right. Strong bilateral investment flows.

energy.summary: Norvegia exports natural gas and electricity to European markets including Svizzera. Both countries are leaders in hydropower. Norvegia's offshore wind expertise complements Swiss clean energy goals.

scientific.summary: Solid scientific collaboration through shared EFTA research programs and Horizon Europe. Joint publications in marine science, climate, and life sciences. Exchange programs between ETH Zurich and Norwegian universities.
